channel.title: Abdallah Dahmani on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Abdallah Dahmani on LMI

item.title: Experimental vapor pressures (from 1 Pa to 100 kPa) of six saturatedFatty Acid Methyl Esters (FAMEs): Methyl hexanoate, methyl octanoate,methyl decanoate, methyl dodecanoate, methyl tetradecanoate and methylhexadecanoate
